contactBody: Whether you've got a brief or just an idea, I'd love to hear from you. The best consumer finance stories often start with a question someone wasn't sure was worth asking.
bio: I'm a consumer finance journalist at The Independent, covering the everyday economics most people have to navigate without a finance degree — energy bills, benefit rules, supermarket prices, the fine print on your bank statement. I believe good financial journalism should feel like advice from a sharp friend, not a compliance document.

Before this, I spent two years at MoneySavingExpert as a news and investigations reporter. My Carer's Allowance campaign contributed to government reform; my Celebrity Scam Ads investigation ran across the national press. MHP 30 to Watch Gold Award and Headline Money Rising Star, 2025.
